markdownRemark.html:
Awesome Python Data Science


Probably the best curated list of data science software in Python

Contents

  • Machine Learning
  • Deep Learning
  • Web Scraping
  • Data Manipulation
  • Feature Engineering
  • Visualization
  • Deployment
  • Model Explanation
  • Reinforcement Learning
  • Probabilistic Methods
  • Genetic Programming
  • Optimization
  • Time Series
  • Natural Language Processing
  • Computer Audition
  • Computer Vision
  • Statistics
  • Distributed Computing

  • Computations
  • Spatial Analysis
  • Quantum Computing
  • Conversion

Machine Learning

General Purpouse Machine Learning

  • scikit-learn - Machine learning in Python.
  • Shogun - Machine learning toolbox.
  • xLearnstars3k - High Performance, Easy-to-use, and Scalable Machine Learning Package.
  • cuMLstars3k - RAPIDS Machine Learning Library.
  • modALstars1.8k - Modular active learning framework for Python3.
  • Sparkit-learnstars1.1k - PySpark + scikit-learn = Sparkit-learn.
  • mlpackstars4.1k - A scalable C++ machine learning library (Python bindings).
  • dlibstars11.5k - Toolkit for making real world machine learning and data analysis applications in C++ (Python bindings).
  • MLxtendstars4.1k - Extension and helper modules for Python's data analysis and machine learning libraries.
  • hyperlearnstars1.4k - 50%+ Faster, 50%+ less RAM usage, GPU support re-written Sklearn, Statsmodels.
  • Reproducible Experiment Platform (REP)stars660 - Machine Learning toolbox for Humans.
  • scikit-multilearnstars786 - Multi-label classification for python.
  • seqlearnstars647 - Sequence classification toolkit for Python.
  • pystructstars663 - Simple structured learning framework for Python.
  • sklearn-expertsysstars481 - Highly interpretable classifiers for scikit learn.
  • RuleFitstars320 - Implementation of the rulefit.
  • metric-learnstars1.3k - Metric learning algorithms in Python.
  • pyGAMstars727 - Generalized Additive Models in Python.
  • Karate Clubstars1.7k - An unsupervised machine learning library for graph structured data.
  • Little Ball of Furstars612 - A library for sampling graph structured data.
  • causalmlstars3.5k - Uplift modeling and causal inference with machine learning algorithms.
  • Deepchecksstars2.1k - Validation & testing of ML models and data during model development, deployment, and production.

Automated Machine Learning

  • TPOTstars8.8k - Automated Machine Learning tool that optimizes machine learning pipelines using genetic programming.
  • auto-sklearnstars6.5k - An automated machine learning toolkit and a drop-in replacement for a scikit-learn estimator.
  • MLBoxstars1.4k - A powerful Automated Machine Learning python library.

Ensemble Methods

  • ML-Ensemble - High performance ensemble learning.
  • Stackingstars189 - Simple and useful stacking library, written in Python.
  • stacked_generalizationstars114 - Library for machine learning stacking generalization.
  • vecstackstars670 - Python package for stacking (machine learning technique).

Imbalanced Datasets

  • imbalanced-learnstars6.1k - Module to perform under sampling and over sampling with various techniques.
  • imbalanced-algorithmsstars217 - Python-based implementations of algorithms for learning on imbalanced data.

Random Forests

  • rpforeststars211 - A forest of random projection trees.
  • sklearn-random-bits-foreststars8 - Wrapper of the Random Bits Forest program written by (Wang et al., 2016).
  • rgf_pythonstars364 - Python Wrapper of Regularized Greedy Forest.

Extreme Learning Machine

  • Python-ELMstars502 - Extreme Learning Machine implementation in Python.
  • Python Extreme Learning Machine (ELM)stars81 - A machine learning technique used for classification/regression tasks.
  • hpelmstars170 - High performance implementation of Extreme Learning Machines (fast randomized neural networks).

Kernel Methods

  • pyFMstars886 - Factorization machines in python.
  • fastFMstars1k - A library for Factorization Machines.
  • tffmstars784 - TensorFlow implementation of an arbitrary order Factorization Machine.
  • liquidSVMstars55 - An implementation of SVMs.
  • scikit-rvmstars203 - Relevance Vector Machine implementation using the scikit-learn API.
  • ThunderSVMstars1.4k - A fast SVM Library on GPUs and CPUs.

Gradient Boosting

  • XGBooststars23.3k - Scalable, Portable and Distributed Gradient Boosting.
  • LightGBMstars14.3k - A fast, distributed, high performance gradient boosting.
  • CatBooststars6.8k - An open-source gradient boosting on decision trees library.
  • ThunderGBMstars644 - Fast GBDTs and Random Forests on GPUs.

Deep Learning

PyTorch

  • PyTorchstars59.6k - Tensors and Dynamic neural networks in Python with strong GPU acceleration.
  • torchvisionstars12.6k - Datasets, Transforms and Models specific to Computer Vision.
  • torchtextstars3.1k - Data loaders and abstractions for text and NLP.
  • torchaudiostars1.9k - An audio library for PyTorch.
  • ignitestars4.1k - High-level library to help with training neural networks in PyTorch.
  • PyTounestars533 - A Keras-like framework and utilities for PyTorch.
  • skorchstars4.7k - A scikit-learn compatible neural network library that wraps pytorch.
  • PyTorchNetstars1.4k - An abstraction to train neural networks.
  • pytorch_geometricstars15.8k - Geometric Deep Learning Extension Library for PyTorch.
  • Catalyststars3k - High-level utils for PyTorch DL & RL research.
  • pytorch_geometric_temporalstars1.8k - Temporal Extension Library for PyTorch Geometric.
  • ChemicalXstars570 - A PyTorch based deep learning library for drug pair scoring.

TensorFlow

  • TensorFlowstars168.4k - Computation using data flow graphs for scalable machine learning by Google.
  • TensorLayerstars7.1k - Deep Learning and Reinforcement Learning Library for Researcher and Engineer.
  • TFLearnstars9.6k - Deep learning library featuring a higher-level API for TensorFlow.
  • Sonnetstars9.4k - TensorFlow-based neural network library.
  • tensorpackstars6.2k - A Neural Net Training Interface on TensorFlow.
  • Polyaxonstars3.2k - A platform that helps you build, manage and monitor deep learning models.
  • NeuPystars721 - NeuPy is a Python library for Artificial Neural Networks and Deep Learning (previously: ).
  • tfdeploystars349 - Deploy tensorflow graphs for fast evaluation and export to tensorflow-less environments running numpy.
  • tensorflow-upstreamstars611 - TensorFlow ROCm port.
  • TensorFlow Foldstars1.8k - Deep learning with dynamic computation graphs in TensorFlow.
  • tensorlmstars63 - Wrapper library for text generation / language models at char and word level with RNN.
  • TensorLightstars10 - A high-level framework for TensorFlow.
  • Mesh TensorFlowstars1.3k - Model Parallelism Made Easier.
  • Ludwigstars8.5k - A toolbox, that allows to train and test deep learning models without the need to write code.
  • Keras - A high-level neural networks API running on top of TensorFlow.
  • keras-contribstars1.6k - Keras community contributions.
  • Hyperasstars2.1k - Keras + Hyperopt: A very simple wrapper for convenient hyperparameter.
  • Elephasstars1.6k - Distributed Deep learning with Keras & Spark.
  • Herastars495 - Train/evaluate a Keras model, get metrics streamed to a dashboard in your browser.
  • Spektralstars2.2k - Deep learning on graphs.
  • qkerasstars420 - A quantization deep learning library.

MXNet

  • MXNetstars20.1k - Lightweight, Portable, Flexible Distributed/Mobile Deep Learning with Dynamic, Mutation-aware Dataflow Dep Scheduler.
  • Gluonstars2.3k - A clear, concise, simple yet powerful and efficient API for deep learning (now included in MXNet).
  • MXboxstars31 - Simple, efficient and flexible vision toolbox for mxnet framework.
  • gluon-cvstars5.3k - Provides implementations of the state-of-the-art deep learning models in computer vision.
  • gluon-nlpstars2.4k - NLP made easy.
  • Xferstars246 - Transfer Learning library for Deep Neural Networks.
  • MXNetstars30 - HIP Port of MXNet.

Others

  • Tangentstars2.2k - Source-to-Source Debuggable Derivatives in Pure Python.
  • autogradstars6k - Efficiently computes derivatives of numpy code.
  • Myiastars455 - Deep Learning framework (pre-alpha).
  • nnablastars2.6k - Neural Network Libraries by Sony.
  • Caffestars32.9k - A fast open framework for deep learning.
  • hipCaffestars126 - The HIP port of Caffe.

DISCONTINUED PROJECTS

Web Scraping

  • BeautifulSoup: The easiest library to scrape static websites for beginners
  • Scrapy: Fast and extensible scraping library. Can write rules and create customized scraper without touching the coure
  • Selenium: Use Selenium Python API to access all functionalities of Selenium WebDriver in an intuitive way like a real user.
  • Patternstars8.3k: High level scraping for well-establish websites such as Google, Twitter, and Wikipedia. Also has NLP, machine learning algorithms, and visualization
  • twitterscraperstars2.2k: Efficient library to scrape twitter

Data Manipulation

Data Containers

  • pandas - Powerful Python data analysis toolkit.
  • pandas_profilingstars9.7k - Create HTML profiling reports from pandas DataFrame objects
  • cuDFstars5.1k - GPU DataFrame Library.
  • blazestars3.1k - NumPy and pandas interface to Big Data.
  • pandasqlstars1.2k - Allows you to query pandas DataFrames using SQL syntax.
  • pandas-gbqstars325 - pandas Google Big Query.
  • xpandasstars25 - Universal 1d/2d data containers with Transformers .functionality for data analysis by The Alan Turing Institute.
  • pysparklingstars251 - A pure Python implementation of Apache Spark's RDD and DStream interfaces.
  • Arcticstars2.8k - High performance datastore for time series and tick data.
  • datatablestars1.6k - Data.table for Python.
  • koalasstars3.2k - pandas API on Apache Spark.
  • modinstars7.9k - Speed up your pandas workflows by changing a single line of code.
  • swifterstars2.1k - A package which efficiently applies any function to a pandas dataframe or series in the fastest available manner.
  • pandas_flavorstars242 - A package which allow to write your own flavor of Pandas easily.
  • pandas-logstars202 - A package which allow to provide feedback about basic pandas operations and find both buisness logic and performance issues.
  • vaexstars7.3k - Out-of-Core DataFrames for Python, ML, visualize and explore big tabular data at a billion rows per second.

Pipelines

  • pdpipestars687 - Sasy pipelines for pandas DataFrames.
  • SSPipe - Python pipe (|) operator with support for DataFrames and Numpy and Pytorch.
  • pandas-plystars185 - Functional data manipulation for pandas.
  • Dplythonstars751 - Dplyr for Python.
  • sklearn-pandasstars2.7k - pandas integration with sklearn.
  • Datasetstars182 - Helps you conveniently work with random or sequential batches of your data and define data processing.
  • pyjanitorstars994 - Clean APIs for data cleaning.
  • mezastars398 - A Python toolkit for processing tabular data.
  • Prodmodelstars52 - Build system for data science pipelines.
  • dopandastars432 - Hints and tips for using pandas in an analysis environment.

Feature Engineering

General

  • Featuretoolsstars6.4k - Automated feature engineering.
  • Feature Enginestars1.1k - Feature engineering package with sklearn like functionality.
  • skl-groupsstars41 - A scikit-learn addon to operate on set/"group"-based features.
  • Feature Forgestars381 - A set of tools for creating and testing machine learning feature.
  • fewstars46 - A feature engineering wrapper for sklearn.
  • scikit-mdrstars122 - A sklearn-compatible Python implementation of Multifactor Dimensionality Reduction (MDR) for feature construction.
  • tsfreshstars6.7k - Automatic extraction of relevant features from time series.

Feature Selection

  • scikit-featurestars1.3k - Feature selection repository in python.
  • boruta_pystars1.2k - Implementations of the Boruta all-relevant feature selection method.
  • BoostARootastars182 - A fast xgboost feature selection algorithm.
  • scikit-rebatestars369 - A scikit-learn-compatible Python implementation of ReBATE, a suite of Relief-based feature selection algorithms for Machine Learning.

Visualization

General Purposes

  • Matplotlibstars16.2k - Plotting with Python.
  • seabornstars9.9k - Statistical data visualization using matplotlib.
  • prettyplotlibstars1.6k - Painlessly create beautiful matplotlib plots.
  • python-ternarystars595 - Ternary plotting library for python with matplotlib.
  • missingnostars3.3k - Missing data visualization module for Python.
  • chartifystars3.2k - Python library that makes it easy for data scientists to create charts.
  • phyststars119 - Improved histograms.

Interactive plots

  • animatplotstars394 - A python package for animating plots build on matplotlib.
  • plotly - A Python library that makes interactive and publication-quality graphs.
  • Bokehstars16.8k - Interactive Web Plotting for Python.
  • Altair - Declarative statistical visualization library for Python. Can easily do many data transformation within the code to create graph
  • bqplotstars3.4k - Plotting library for IPython/Jupyter notebooks
  • pyechartsstars12.8k - Migrated from Echartsstars53k, a charting and visualization library, to Python's interactive visual drawing library.

Map

  • folium - Makes it easy to visualize data on an interactive open street map
  • geemapstars2.3k - Python package for interactive mapping with Google Earth Engine (GEE)

Automatic Plotting

  • HoloViewsstars2.3k - Stop plotting your data - annotate your data and let it visualize itself.
  • AutoVizstars962: Visualize data automatically with 1 line of code (ideal for machine learning)
  • SweetVizstars2.2k: Visualize and compare datasets, target values and associations, with one line of code.

NLP

  • pyLDAvisstars1.6k: Visualize interactive topic model

Deployment

  • datapane - A collection of APIs to turn scripts and notebooks into interactive reports.
  • binder - Enable sharing and execute Jupyter Notebooks
  • fastapi - Modern, fast (high-performance), web framework for building APIs with Python
  • streamlit - Make it easy to deploy machine learning model

Model Explanation

  • Shapleystars181 - A data-driven framework to quantify the value of classifiers in a machine learning ensemble.
  • Alibistars1.8k - Algorithms for monitoring and explaining machine learning models.
  • anchorstars721 - Code for "High-Precision Model-Agnostic Explanations" paper.
  • aequitasstars499 - Bias and Fairness Audit Toolkit.
  • Contrastive Explanationstars41 - Contrastive Explanation (Foil Trees).
  • yellowbrickstars3.8k - Visual analysis and diagnostic tools to facilitate machine learning model selection.
  • scikit-plotstars2.2k - An intuitive library to add plotting functionality to scikit-learn objects.
  • shapstars17.7k - A unified approach to explain the output of any machine learning model.
  • ELI5stars2.6k - A library for debugging/inspecting machine learning classifiers and explaining their predictions.
  • Limestars10.1k - Explaining the predictions of any machine learning classifier.
  • FairMLstars336 - FairML is a python toolbox auditing the machine learning models for bias.
  • L2Xstars113 - Code for replicating the experiments in the paper Learning to Explain: An Information-Theoretic Perspective on Model Interpretation.
  • PDPboxstars708 - Partial dependence plot toolbox.
  • pyBreakDownstars41 - Python implementation of R package breakDown.
  • PyCEboxstars134 - Python Individual Conditional Expectation Plot Toolbox.
  • Skaterstars1k - Python Library for Model Interpretation.
  • model-analysisstars1.2k - Model analysis tools for TensorFlow.
  • themis-mlstars101 - A library that implements fairness-aware machine learning algorithms.
  • treeinterpreterstars716 - Interpreting scikit-learn's decision tree and random forest predictions.
  • AI Explainability 360stars1.2k - Interpretability and explainability of data and machine learning models.
  • Auralisationstars40 - Auralisation of learned features in CNN (for audio).
  • CapsNet-Visualizationstars386 - A visualization of the CapsNet layers to better understand how it works.
  • lucidstars4.5k - A collection of infrastructure and tools for research in neural network interpretability.
  • Netronstars20.2k - Visualizer for deep learning and machine learning models (no Python code, but visualizes models from most Python Deep Learning frameworks).
  • FlashLight - Visualization Tool for your NeuralNetwork.
  • tensorboard-pytorchstars7.5k - Tensorboard for pytorch (and chainer, mxnet, numpy, ...).
  • mxboardstars327 - Logging MXNet data for visualization in TensorBoard.

Reinforcement Learning

  • OpenAI Gymstars28.8k - A toolkit for developing and comparing reinforcement learning algorithms.
  • Coachstars2.2k - Easy experimentation with state of the art Reinforcement Learning algorithms.
  • garagestars1.5k - A toolkit for reproducible reinforcement learning research.
  • OpenAI Baselinesstars13k - High-quality implementations of reinforcement learning algorithms.
  • Stable Baselinesstars3.6k - A set of improved implementations of reinforcement learning algorithms based on OpenAI Baselines.
  • RLlib - Scalable Reinforcement Learning.
  • Horizonstars3.3k - A platform for Applied Reinforcement Learning.
  • TF-Agentsstars2.4k - A library for Reinforcement Learning in TensorFlow.
  • TensorForcestars3.2k - A TensorFlow library for applied reinforcement learning.
  • TRFLstars3.1k - TensorFlow Reinforcement Learning.
  • Dopaminestars9.9k - A research framework for fast prototyping of reinforcement learning algorithms.
  • keras-rlstars5.3k - Deep Reinforcement Learning for Keras.
  • ChainerRLstars1.1k - A deep reinforcement learning library built on top of Chainer.

Probabilistic Methods

  • pyrostars7.6k - A flexible, scalable deep probabilistic programming library built on PyTorch.
  • pomegranatestars3k - Probabilistic and graphical models for Python.
  • ZhuSuan - Bayesian Deep Learning.
  • PyMCstars7.1k - Bayesian Stochastic Modelling in Python.
  • InferPystars141 - Deep Probabilistic Modelling Made Easy.
  • GPflow - Gaussian processes in TensorFlow.
  • PyStanstars209 - Bayesian inference using the No-U-Turn sampler (Python interface).
  • sklearn-bayesstars475 - Python package for Bayesian Machine Learning with scikit-learn API.
  • pgmpystars2.2k - A python library for working with Probabilistic Graphical Models.
  • skprostars113 - Supervised domain-agnostic prediction framework for probabilistic modelling by The Alan Turing Institute.
  • PtStatstars108 - Probabilistic Programming and Statistical Inference in PyTorch.
  • PyVarInfstars342 - Bayesian Deep Learning methods with Variational Inference for PyTorch.
  • emceestars1.3k - The Python ensemble sampling toolkit for affine-invariant MCMC.
  • hsmmlearnstars62 - A library for hidden semi-Markov models with explicit durations.
  • pyhsmmstars519 - Bayesian inference in HSMMs and HMMs.
  • GPyTorchstars2.9k - A highly efficient and modular implementation of Gaussian Processes in PyTorch.
  • MXFusionstars100 - Modular Probabilistic Programming on MXNet.
  • sklearn-crfsuitestars411 - A scikit-learn inspired API for CRFsuite.

Genetic Programming

  • gplearnstars1.2k - Genetic Programming in Python.
  • DEAPstars4.8k - Distributed Evolutionary Algorithms in Python.
  • karoo_gpstars147 - A Genetic Programming platform for Python with GPU support.
  • monkeysstars110 - A strongly-typed genetic programming framework for Python.
  • sklearn-geneticstars252 - Genetic feature selection module for scikit-learn.

Optimization

  • Spearmintstars1.5k - Bayesian optimization.
  • BoTorchstars2.4k - Bayesian optimization in PyTorch.
  • scikit-optstars3.6k - Heuristic Algorithms for optimization.
  • sklearn-genetic-optstars156 - Hyperparameters tuning and feature selection, using evolutionary algorithms.
  • SMAC3stars744 - Sequential Model-based Algorithm Configuration.
  • Optunitystars396 - Is a library containing various optimizers for hyperparameter tuning.
  • hyperoptstars6.4k - Distributed Asynchronous Hyperparameter Optimization in Python.
  • hyperopt-sklearnstars1.4k - Hyper-parameter optimization for sklearn.
  • sklearn-deapstars704 - Use evolutionary algorithms instead of gridsearch in scikit-learn.
  • sigopt_sklearnstars73 - SigOpt wrappers for scikit-learn methods.
  • Bayesian Optimizationstars6.3k - A Python implementation of global optimization with gaussian processes.
  • SafeOptstars106 - Safe Bayesian Optimization.
  • scikit-optimizestars2.4k - Sequential model-based optimization with a scipy.optimize interface.
  • Solidstars563 - A comprehensive gradient-free optimization framework written in Python.
  • PySwarmsstars984 - A research toolkit for particle swarm optimization in Python.
  • Platypusstars409 - A Free and Open Source Python Library for Multiobjective Optimization.
  • GPflowOptstars252 - Bayesian Optimization using GPflow.
  • POTstars1.6k - Python Optimal Transport library.
  • Talosstars1.6k - Hyperparameter Optimization for Keras Models.
  • nloptstars1.4k - Library for nonlinear optimization (global and local, constrained or unconstrained).

Time Series

  • sktimestars5.8k - A unified framework for machine learning with time series.
  • dartsstars4.8k - A python library for easy manipulation and forecasting of time series.
  • statsforecaststars1.5k - Lightning fast forecasting with statistical and econometric models.
  • mlforecaststars95 - Scalable machine learning based time series forecasting.
  • neuralforecaststars896 - Scalable machine learning based time series forecasting.
  • tslearnstars2.3k - Machine learning toolkit dedicated to time-series data.
  • tickstars402 - Module for statistical learning, with a particular emphasis on time-dependent modelling.
  • greykitestars1.6k - A flexible, intuitive and fast forecasting librarynext.
  • Prophetstars15k - Automatic Forecasting Procedure.
  • PyFluxstars2k - Open source time series library for Python.
  • bayesloopstars119 - Probabilistic programming framework that facilitates objective model selection for time-varying parameter models.
  • luminolstars1.1k - Anomaly Detection and Correlation library.
  • dateutil - Powerful extensions to the standard datetime module
  • mayastars3.4k - makes it very easy to parse a string and for changing timezones
  • Chaos Geniusstars482 - ML powered analytics engine for outlier/anomaly detection and root cause analysis

Natural Language Processing

  • NLTKstars11.1k - Modules, data sets, and tutorials supporting research and development in Natural Language Processing.
  • CLTKstars746 - The Classical Language Toolkik.
  • gensim - Topic Modelling for Humans.
  • PSI-Toolkit - A natural language processing toolkit.
  • pyMorfologikstars18 - Python binding for Morfologik.
  • skiftstars233 - Scikit-learn wrappers for Python fastText.
  • Phonemizerstars711 - Simple text to phonemes converter for multiple languages.
  • flairstars12.1k - Very simple framework for state-of-the-art NLP.
  • spaCy - Industrial-Strength Natural Language Processing.

Computer Audition

  • librosastars5.4k - Python library for audio and music analysis.
  • Yaafestars229 - Audio features extraction.
  • aubiostars2.8k - A library for audio and music analysis.
  • Essentiastars2.2k - Library for audio and music analysis, description and synthesis.
  • LibXtractstars214 - A simple, portable, lightweight library of audio feature extraction functions.
  • Marsyasstars361 - Music Analysis, Retrieval and Synthesis for Audio Signals.
  • mudastars212 - A library for augmenting annotated audio data.
  • madmomstars965 - Python audio and music signal processing library.

Computer Vision

  • OpenCVstars64.2k - Open Source Computer Vision Library.
  • scikit-imagestars5.1k - Image Processing SciKit (Toolbox for SciPy).
  • imgaugstars13k - Image augmentation for machine learning experiments.
  • imgaug_extension - Additional augmentations for imgaug.
  • Augmentorstars4.8k - Image augmentation library in Python for machine learning.
  • albumentationsstars11k - Fast image augmentation library and easy to use wrapper around other libraries.

Statistics

  • pandas_summarystars440 - Extension to pandas dataframes describe function.
  • Pandas Profilingstars9.7k - Create HTML profiling reports from pandas DataFrame objects.
  • statsmodelsstars7.8k - Statistical modeling and econometrics in Python.
  • stockstatsstars1k - Supply a wrapper StockDataFrame based on the pandas.DataFrame with inline stock statistics/indicators support.
  • weightedcalcsstars96 - A pandas-based utility to calculate weighted means, medians, distributions, standard deviations, and more.
  • scikit-posthocsstars259 - Pairwise Multiple Comparisons Post-hoc Tests.
  • Alphalensstars2.4k - Performance analysis of predictive (alpha) stock factors.

Distributed Computing

  • Horovodstars12.8k - Distributed training framework for TensorFlow, Keras, PyTorch, and Apache MXNet.
  • PySpark - Exposes the Spark programming model to Python.
  • Velesstars898 - Distributed machine learning platform.
  • Jubatusstars702 - Framework and Library for Distributed Online Machine Learning.
  • DMTKstars2.8k - Microsoft Distributed Machine Learning Toolkit.
  • PaddlePaddlestars19k - PArallel Distributed Deep LEarning.
  • dask-mlstars825 - Distributed and parallel machine learning.
  • Distributedstars1.4k - Distributed computation in Python.

Experimentation

  • envdstars1.1k - 🏕️ machine learning development environment for data science and AI/ML engineering teams.
  • Sacredstars3.9k - A tool to help you configure, organize, log and reproduce experiments.
  • Xcessivstars1.3k - A web-based application for quick, scalable, and automated hyperparameter tuning and stacked ensembling.
  • Persimmonstars191 - A visual dataflow programming language for sklearn.
  • Axstars1.9k - Adaptive Experimentation Platform.
  • Neptune - A lightweight ML experiment tracking, results visualization and management tool.

Evaluation

  • recmetricsstars428 - Library of useful metrics and plots for evaluating recommender systems.
  • Metricsstars1.6k - Machine learning evaluation metric.
  • sklearn-evaluationstars336 - Model evaluation made easy: plots, tables and markdown reports.
  • AI Fairness 360stars1.9k - Fairness metrics for datasets and ML models, explanations and algorithms to mitigate bias in datasets and models.

Computations

  • numpy - The fundamental package needed for scientific computing with Python.
  • Daskstars10.4k - Parallel computing with task scheduling.
  • bottleneckstars802 - Fast NumPy array functions written in C.
  • CuPystars6.4k - NumPy-like API accelerated with CUDA.
  • scikit-tensorstars393 - Python library for multilinear algebra and tensor factorizations.
  • numdifftoolsstars176 - Solve automatic numerical differentiation problems in one or more variables.
  • quaternionstars521 - Add built-in support for quaternions to numpy.
  • adaptivestars731 - Tools for adaptive and parallel samping of mathematical functions.

Spatial Analysis

  • GeoPandasstars3.4k - Python tools for geographic data.
  • PySalstars1.1k - Python Spatial Analysis Library.

Quantum Computing

  • PennyLanestars1.6k - Quantum machine learning, automatic differentiation, and optimization of hybrid quantum-classical computations.
  • QMLstars175 - A Python Toolkit for Quantum Machine Learning.

Conversion

  • sklearn-porterstars1.2k - Transpile trained scikit-learn estimators to C, Java, JavaScript and others.
  • ONNXstars13.4k - Open Neural Network Exchange.
  • MMdnnstars5.6k - A set of tools to help users inter-operate among different deep learning frameworks.

Contributing

Contributions are welcome!
Read the contribution guideline.
